scope: Acceptance thresholds and paper-language guardrails for RC-RefGS using current i300 evidence.

claim_gates.claim_text: RC-RefGS lowers measured reprojected reflection-consistency error relative to matched Ref-GS baselines under the short i300 sanity protocol.
claim_gates.minimum_threshold: All reported scene/split rows must have rc_mean_reflection_consistency < baseline_mean_reflection_consistency with identical splits, iterations, and pair-count settings.
claim_gates.current_evidence: Six of six scene/split rows pass: teapot train/test, toaster train/test, and car train/test.
required_qualifiers: Pair-sampling dependent metric with max_pairs=10 and max_angle_deg=180.
Diagnostic claim only, not broad rendering or geometry quality.

claim_gates.claim_text: RC-RefGS consistently improves reflection consistency as a method-level result.
claim_gates.minimum_threshold: Repeat the reflection diagnostic at longer horizons and on at least the intended main scene set; preserve identical seeds/splits/iterations; report pair counts and sampling settings; require no unexplained scene-level regressions.
claim_gates.current_evidence: Current i300 result is directionally consistent but short-run and one-seed only.
required_qualifiers: Do not remove short-run caveat until longer-horizon runs complete.
Do not imply external superiority unless external baselines are evaluated under comparable settings.

claim_gates.minimum_threshold: LPIPS must be available, and PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS trends must be non-negative or explicitly explained across scenes and splits before any aggregate rendering-quality claim.
claim_gates.current_evidence: PSNR/SSIM are mixed: teapot improves, toaster is mixed, and car slightly regresses; LPIPS was skipped.
required_qualifiers: Current evidence permits only reporting the mixed table.

claim_gates.claim_text: Normal-map diagnostics are directionally favorable under the raw RefNeRF normal convention.
claim_gates.minimum_threshold: All reported rows should improve normal MAE and mean cosine, with GT normal convention stated and missing-normal counts reported.
claim_gates.current_evidence: Six of six rows improve MAE and cosine with raw GT normals and zero missing normals, but toaster/car deltas are small.
required_qualifiers: Effect sizes are small, especially outside teapot.

claim_gates.claim_text: RC-RefGS improves mesh, surface reconstruction, or geometry quality.
claim_gates.minimum_threshold: Extract comparable meshes and evaluate against valid reference geometry such as SMVP3D OBJ meshes using Chamfer/F-score or an equivalent metric; do not use RefNeRF points3d.ply as ground truth.
claim_gates.current_evidence: Current RefNeRF outputs lack extracted meshes; RefNeRF points3d.ply is random initialization data; SMVP3D needs loader/runtime prerequisites.

claim_gates.claim_text: The observed effects are caused specifically by the reflection-consistency loss.
claim_gates.minimum_threshold: Run matched ablations for w/o L_ref, w/o specular confidence, and roughness-only regularization with the same scene/split/iteration protocol.
required_qualifiers: Frame current observations as associated with the RC setting.
Avoid causal attribution beyond the implemented intervention until ablations are run.

paper_language.safe_contribution_bullet: [Evidence] We add a gated cross-view reflection-consistency objective to Ref-GS while preserving the original representation and renderer. [Evidence] In short i300 sanity runs on teapot, toaster, and car, the RC setting lowers the measured reprojected reflection-consistency error on both train and held-out test splits relative to matched Ref-GS baselines. [Qualifier] These results support the intended diagnostic target and are not evidence of broad rendering or geometry improvement.
paper_language.safe_results_sentence: [Evidence] Across the three i300 sanity scenes, RC-RefGS reduces the measured reflection-consistency error in all six train/test rows under max_pairs=10 and max_angle_deg=180. [Qualifier] PSNR/SSIM trends are mixed and LPIPS is unavailable, so we report these metrics without claiming overall novel-view synthesis gains.
paper_language.safe_normal_sentence: [Evidence] Full-split raw-convention normal diagnostics improve MAE and mean cosine in all six scene/split rows. [Qualifier] The deltas are small and are treated as diagnostics rather than geometry-quality evidence.
paper_language.required_limitation_sentence: [Qualifier] Current evidence is limited to three short-run scenes, one seed, sampled reflection pairs, no LPIPS, no external baselines, no ablation table, and no mesh/reference-geometry metric.

decision.model_recommendation: SWITCH MODEL to gpt-5.5 for final paper-language polishing if manuscript prose is the next task.
